subcodes.first_line: O my Lord! This is a servant who hath turned to Thee with a gainful exchange, a trimphant truth, and a flourishing essence.  His heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذا عبد قد توجه الیک بصفقه رابحه و حقیقه ناجحه و کینونه فالحه و قلب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
